overall.description: Gameplay footage from the Hitman video game series featuring Agent 47 navigating a luxurious art deco building. The clip shows the character walking from an exterior covered walkway with a weathered gold wall, across a reflective courtyard, through a security checkpoint, and into an opulent interior lounge with blue curtains and modern furnishings.

large arched structure with glass panels and golden frames

segments.scene_description: Agent 47 walks along a covered exterior walkway beside a towering weathered gold wall. The space features dramatic arched architecture with glass panels on the left and a highly reflective marble floor. The character turns left at the corner of the wall to head toward the open courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: reflective courtyard with geometric floor patterns

events.description: sunlight becomes more direct as ego moves into the open courtyard area

agents.ego_description: crossing the expansive reflective courtyard with geometric floor inlays, heading toward the building entrance

entered.detail: reflective floor with gold geometric inlay patterns
modern glass facade of the main building with visible interior
solitary green tree in a planter within the courtyard
entrance area with security personnel visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide courtyard with dramatic geometric patterns on the reflective floor. The camera moves toward a modern glass building facade with a security checkpoint visible ahead. A single tree stands in the center of the plaza as sunlight streams through the glass roof structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint entrance with art deco details

events.description: passing through the security checkpoint and entering the building interior

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the security checkpoint flanked by guards in red berets

entered.detail: ornate glass and metal doorway with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Agent 47 approaches the building entrance where two security guards in red berets stand at attention. Passing through the art deco doorway, the scene transitions to an interior space with a grand blue-carpeted staircase and golden decorative elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury lounge with blue curtains and modern furnishings

events.description: turning slightly to the right to explore the lounge area

agents.ego_description: walking through the opulent lounge, passing modern furniture and approaching the large windows

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the far windows overlooking the city

large geometric hanging light fixture with golden elements

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious luxury lounge featuring deep blue velvet curtains, modern white sofas, and a dramatic chandelier. Floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a cityscape view while the character explores the room, passing decorative sculptures and modern furnishings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a weathered exterior walkway into the opulent, modern interior of a luxury lounge. It begins with Agent 47 walking beside a towering gold wall under dramatic arched architecture, moving across a reflective marble floor before turning toward an open plaza. As the camera enters the wide courtyard, the space opens up to reveal geometric floor patterns and a single central tree beneath a sunlit glass roof. The scene then shifts toward a glass building facade, passing two security guards in red berets at a checkpoint to transition through an art deco doorway into a grand hall with a blue-carpeted staircase. Finally, the movement flows into a spacious lounge characterized by deep blue velvet curtains, white sofas, and a dramatic chandelier, with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a distant cityscape.
